title: [FIRRTL] Remove FInstanceLike from ObjectOp and add interface methods to FInstanceLike, NFCI
body:
Currently FInstanceLike doesn't provide [any meaning common interface](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/7f76cbc26ec0edbed1109df13bc1c7e523242c54/include/circt/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLOpInterfaces.td#L292-L299) due to representation difference of ObjectOp. 
Previously it simply meant FIRRTL dialect +  `InstanceOpInterface`  and only meaningful use case was Dedup. 

The first commit removes FInstanceLike from ObjectOp and allows us to add port related interfaces to FInstanceLike. 

The second commit moves port related utilities to interfaces and remove a bit of template code. No functional change (so the bug is kept as is, ExtractInstance should crashes with InstanceChoice as before)
